en.name: Level 3 — Electrical Station
en.shortDescription: An abandoned industrial complex, resource-rich but walled by indestructible barriers and hunted by unusually intelligent, coordinated entities.
en.atmosphere: Dark brick halls of archaic electrical gear, humming machines and black liquid in the pipes; a pervasive sense of being hunted.
en.tips: Never go alone. Reach Base Gamma. Don't stare at barred areas. Carry a flashlight and a light-bomb against entity brigades.
